assertions.description: The KiCad 5 legacy parser correctly identifies a voltage divider formed by R23(10k) and potentiometer RV1(10k) with top_net=Vref feeding the non-inverting input of U1 pin 5. The KiCad 8 parser does not include this divider in its 5 voltage dividers. RV1 is a potentiometer (JST connector footprint) and may be excluded from divider detection because its symbol/lib_id does not match the standard resistor pattern, causing the divider formed with R23 to be dropped.
